title: Skypiea Says Goodbye
description: The Straw Hats leave Skypiea behind, carrying treasure, memories, and the sound of the golden bell back toward the Blue Sea.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Luffy, Nami, Gan Fall, Usopp, Conis. The Straw Hats leave Skypiea behind, carrying treasure, memories, and the sound of the golden bell back toward the Blue Sea.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I am a knight of the sky!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: I leave it in your care, chief.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And support this deeply wounded country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You have all of our support!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Ooh! Ooh! I want some books!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Everyone! Please look towards the front!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now that we're about to leave,

summary: The Straw Hats leave Skypiea behind, carrying treasure, memories, and the sound of the golden bell back toward the Blue Sea.
